dependent_vars.definition: end-to-end catch indicator through the model->record step (P10 interface)
dependent_vars.name: record_caught

dependent_vars.definition: task + kernel-covered-slice accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component)
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier NN-cleanup |lexicon|·D MACs on the ledger (V component)

n_planned.detectable: catch >=0.80 gate at n=300 needs true rate >~0.86; FP <=2% gate at n=300 needs true FP <~1.1% (P8 §1.6) — both printed per the decidability lint; wilson gates re-lint at this record's freeze

endpoints.test: one-sided exact binomial vs 0.80 over >=300 planted violations, α=0.05; Wilson 95% lower bound must clear 0.80
RT-7c natural-violation sub-corpus, Holm-corrected secondary; planted corpus stays the powered primary

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HC2 (verbatim): Measured range: 135M–360M. Envelope: Checker soundness is model-free (deterministic) and extrapolates without limit; the END-TO-END rate is bottlenecked by decode fidelity, extrapolation ≤3B; larger hosts likely *improve* decode legibility (favourable direction, unmeasured). Anchor: AlphaGeometry/Logic-LM template (Law 3): deterministic-engine correctness is scale-invariant; only the neural translation step scales.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §2 HC2 kill criterion (verbatim): 'Dead if end-to-end catch rate < 0.80 (one-sided exact binomial vs the 0.80 threshold, α=0.05: the Wilson 95% lower bound over ≥300 planted violations must clear 0.80), or < 3× the best text arm's catch rate (paired bootstrap on the per-record catch indicator, α=0.05), or false-positive rate on clean records > 2% (Wilson upper bound must sit below 2%). (The checker itself is deterministic; what is genuinely at risk is the decode step and the authoring of checkable axioms — a fail here indicts the pipeline, and the verdict must say which stage failed.)'

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/
corpus_hashes.instance-record-corpus: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:d-ir (seeded, planted rates in this record at freeze)
corpus_hashes.natural-violation-corpus: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:d-ir-n (blind-adjudicated; never surfaced by the checker under test)

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: E9-C — axiom-sidecar constraint-violation delta: planted violations text arms structurally cannot catch (HC2; HS11 text-diff-checker part; D-IR planted primary + D-IR-N natural secondary per RT-7c)
